## Epic 5 — Magic System (#58)

**Dependency:** #53, #54, #55, #56, #57
**Est. Effort:** Large

### Goal
Write chapter 11 — Arcane Spells, the complete catalog of arcane spell chains.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Arcane Spell List** — How to use this chapter
2. **Spell Chain Format** — How to read a spell entry
3. **Elemental Magic** — Fire, Ice, Lightning, Acid chains
4. **Force & Energy Magic** — Force, Radiant, Necrotic chains
5. **Control & Enchantment** — Charm, Fear, Domination chains
6. **Illusion Magic** — Image, Invisibility, Phantasm chains
7. **Conjuration & Summoning** — Portal, Summon chains
8. **Transmutation** — Polymorph, Teleport, Time chains
9. **Divination** — Detection, Scrying chains
10. **Spell Quick-Reference Tables** — By element, by dice requirement, by tier

### Per-Spell Entry Format
```
=== Spell Name
*Tier:* Novice/Adept/Master | *Dice Required:* [types]
*Casting Time:* [action/bonus/reaction/minutes]
*Range:* [touch/30ft/120ft/etc.]

*Weak:* [effect description and damage]
*Standard:* [effect description and damage]
*Strong:* [effect description and damage]

*Chain:* Novice: [spell] → Adept: [spell] → Master: [spell]
```

### Tasks
- [ ] Assemble all arcane spell entries from #53-#57
- [ ] Format consistent spell entry blocks
- [ ] Create quick-reference tables
- [ ] Add flavor text/quotations
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: magic system (ch10)
